M-080.NAME: visible-brand-logo-integration
M-080.path: frontend/public/brand/krotpn-mark-96.png frontend-admin/public/brand/krotpn-mark-96.png frontend/src/components/BrandMark.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/BrandMark.tsx frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx frontend/src/pages/ResetPassword.tsx frontend/src/pages/VerifyEmail.tsx frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/index.css backend/app/email/templates.py docs/plans/Phase-63.xml docs/plans/Phase-67.xml scripts/phase63-visible-logo-integration-smoke.mjs scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs
M-080.owns: Visible KrotPN logo usage across public site, auth, user cabinet, admin panel, PWA/favicons, and email templates.
M-080.purpose: Use prepared logo assets consistently where the premium redesign needs visible brand identity.

exports.component-brand-mark: User and admin reusable brand mark placement.
exports.rule-logo-sizing: Responsive logo sizing and asset selection for header, auth, PWA, email, and admin contexts.
exports.asset-visible-mark: User/admin /brand/krotpn-mark-96.png copied from the prepared 96x96 PNG source for visible UI logo usage.
exports.smoke-phase63-visible-logo: Validate asset dimensions, UI placement markers, regression compatibility, email/BIMI boundary, asset budgets, and protected surfaces.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not overwrite BIMI semantics or claim mailbox sender-avatar control.
constraints.constraint-2: Use appropriately sized assets and avoid large logo files on first paint.
constraints.constraint-3: Logo placement must not crowd mobile navigation, forms, cards, or admin tables.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: User and admin builds include visible logo usage without layout overlap.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Logo smoke verifies source dimensions, copied assets, placement markers, email/BIMI boundary, and protected deploy/runtime guard.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Static route proof and regression smokes confirm premium brand presence on public/auth/user/admin surfaces; live browser screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Phase-63 verification design is complete before execution: asset budgets, visible-placement rules, screenshot/static proof, email/BIMI boundary, and protected-surface guard are explicitly mapped in V-M-080.

phase-67-plan.scope: Provide a larger unframed KrotPN mark for splash and auth routes while retaining the existing bounded logo asset and avoiding provider/BIMI/email-avatar claims.
phase-67-plan.guards: The large logo must not use the previous frame/lockup border, must not crowd inputs/buttons on mobile, must remain budget-safe, and must preserve current favicon/PWA/email-logo boundaries.

verification-design.target-1: Phase-63 smoke must validate selected asset dimensions and file weights before any visible logo placement is accepted.
verification-design.target-2: User/admin builds and screenshot/static proof must show logo placement does not crowd mobile navigation, forms, admin tables, cards, or primary CTAs.
verification-design.target-3: Email template checks remain boundary-only in Phase-63; premium email body redesign belongs to Phase-64 and mailbox sender-avatar/BIMI claims remain out of scope.
verification-design.target-4: Protected install/deploy/backend/VPN/MTProto runtime surfaces must remain unchanged.

execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04: Phase-63 selected 96x96.png from the prepared operator logo set, copied it as frontend/public/brand/krotpn-mark-96.png and frontend-admin/public/brand/krotpn-mark-96.png, added user/admin BrandMark components, integrated visible logos into public/auth routes, protected user shell, admin login, admin rail, and admin topbar, preserved existing email-logo/BIMI/provider-avatar boundaries, and kept deploy/install/backend/VPN/MTProto/runtime surfaces unchanged.
execution-evidence.verification-2026-06-04: Passed: frontend build, frontend-admin build, scripts/phase63-visible-logo-integration-smoke.mjs, Phase-55/56/57/58/60/61/62 regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.

M-080.hotspot: H-067: Visible logo integration must use prepared brand assets without bloating pages or conflicting with BIMI/email-avatar boundaries.
